title: narcissus angustifolius
intro: Narcissus angustifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved daffodil, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Narcissus angustifolius include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Narcissus angustifolius can be made by using the plant's bulbs, leaves, and flowers, which can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
